reviews.review_title: Great tool to learn sprint drills
reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure what sprinting with a headset outside would be like, but this app does a great job of using mixed reality and teaching basic sprint drills like the 5x10x5. Realistically it's still a little early to be sprinting with a Quest 3 on your head and after 20 minutes I started to develop some neck strain. Once this is available on AR glasses or specifically designed lighter MR headsets experiences like this are going to be so cool! 5 Stars because I learnt some new drills and it makes setting up cones way easier. Plus racing your ghost is great motivation to keep pushing!
